title: quercus × hispanica var. gussonei
intro: Quercus × hispanica var. gussonei, also known as the Spanish oak, is a hybrid of the holm oak and the sessile oak, characterized by its unique blend of characteristics from its parent species. The medicinal properties of Quercus × hispanica var. gussonei include its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. This plant is known to offer several health benefits, including reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant. The herbal preparations of Quercus × hispanica var. gussonei include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
